div1.entryFree: Subornation, the crime of procuring one to do a bad action, and specially to bear false witness: guilty of perjury and s. Lucr. 919. wear the detested blot of murtherous s. H4A I, 3, 163. the duchess by his s. began her devilish practices, H6B III, 1, 45. foul s. is predominant, H6B III, 1, 45
